posts.author: blue5707
posts.title:
A school in Naperville, Illinois, did an experiment called "Zero Hour."

Before school, students would HIT THE GYM at 7am and push their heart rates to 80% of their max. Then went on to class.

The result? Reading scores doubled. Math scores jumped 20x...

quotedTweet.content:
Scientists measured cardiovascular fitness in 1.2 million 18-year-olds, then followed them for 10-36 years.

The fitter they were, the more likely they were to:
1) score higher on intelligence tests
2) earn a university degree
3) reach a higher-status job

Do your cardio.

twitter.content:
